name: CAVA GROUP, INC.
business: CAVA operates 439 fast-casual Mediterranean restaurants in 28 states and Washington, D.C., offering chef-curated and customizable bowls and pitas. It centrally produces dips, spreads, and dressing bases for restaurants and sells them in grocery stores.
sellsTo: consumers dining in or taking out

exposures.sentence: As of December 28, 2025, we operate 439 fast-casual CAVA Restaurants in 28 states and Washington, D.C. ... while also selling our dips, spreads, and prepared dressings in grocery stores.

We have built a robust, multi-channel experience that includes in-restaurant dining, digital pick-up, drive-thru pick-up in select restaurants, delivery, catering in select markets, and CPG offerings all supported by a strong digital and data infrastructure.

catalysts.event: New Project Soul design for 2026 restaurant openings
catalysts.sentence: Our 2026 restaurant openings will feature our new Project Soul design, which, in addition to convenience, expresses our Mediterranean hospitality and taps into guests desire for human connection, including softer seating, more greenery and a warmer brand pallet.

catalysts.event: Expand catering capabilities to an additional test market in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We are in the early stages of our catering program and plan to expand our catering capabilities to an additional test market in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Opportunity for more than 1,000 CAVA restaurants in the United States by 2032
tamClaims.sentence: We are in the early stages of fulfilling our total restaurant potential, and we believe there is opportunity for more than 1,000 CAVA restaurants in the United States by 2032.
